user_prompt: Find any anomalies in this data and write a summary report

source_data_summary.ground_truth: Planted: South/Product_B March: Revenue dropped from 37,655 (Feb) to 22,216 (Mar) — 41% decline. Global z-score = -1.47; requires per-series Region×Product analysis to detect.. Organic: South/Product_E August: Revenue 20,000 vs series avg ~34,000

ground_truth_anomalies.planted: South/Product_B March: Revenue dropped from 37,655 (Feb) to 22,216 (Mar) — 41% decline. Global z-score = -1.47; requires per-series Region×Product analysis to detect.
ground_truth_anomalies.organic: South/Product_E August: Revenue 20,000 vs series avg ~34,000

agent_plan: Load 02_single_anomaly_subtle.xlsx, compute KPIs and z-score anomaly detection per Region x Product, create charts, write detailed Word report.

key_facts_produced: exec_summary: Full-year revenue 8,330,077 across 33,157 units. H2 up 7.3% vs H1.

facts_produced_in_excel_step2: anomalies_detected: [North/Product_B Nov z=2.26, North/Product_C Dec z=2.26, South/Product_B Mar z=-2.85, South/Product_E Aug z=-2.81]

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: Full-year revenue 8,330,077 across 33,157 units. H2 up 7.3% vs H1. Best month: November (749,317). Worst month: March (638,957). 4 anomalies detected requiring investigation.
word_output_actual_text.anomaly_section: 4 statistical outliers detected at |z|>=2 threshold. Anomaly details: North/Product_B in November: revenue 51,790 (z-score 2.26); North/Product_C in December: revenue 45,366 (z-score 2.26); South/Product_B in March: revenue 22,216 (z-score -2.85); South/Product_E in August: revenue 20,000 (z-score -2.81).
recommendations: Investigate North/Product_B November anomaly — revenue dropped to 51,790 (z=2.26).
